title: amsinckia menziesii var. retrorsa
intro: Amsinckia menziesii var. retrorsa, also known as western fiddleneck, is a flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Amsinckia menziesii var. retrorsa include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of western fiddleneck can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
